messages: Validation passed. Now let me commit and finalize.

The `in-progress/` directory is gitignored by design — the pipeline reads outputs from disk directly. The file exists at the declared output path and passes validation. Let me confirm one more time and report completion.

The acceptance contract is written, validated, and ready. Summary of what was produced:  - **13 `required_dom` entries** covering: trigger button (many), modal wrapper, base modal, product name, price, main image, swatches (many), quantity stepper, add-to-cart button, wishlist button, full-details link, close button, and add-to-cart confirmation - **5 `required_flows`**: open-quick-view-modal, quick-view-shows-all-controls, swatch-selection-updates-image, add-to-cart-from-quick-view, close-modal-stays-on-plp - **2 `forbidden_network_failures`**: product GET and basket item POST - **7 `base_template_reuse` entries**: ProductViewModal, ProductView, useProduct, useAddToCartModal, useWishList, ImageGallery, SwatchGroup - All multi-instance testids (`quick-view-trigger`, `quick-view-swatch`) properly use `match: first` or `match: nth` in flow steps - No `requires_non_empty_text` on `cardinality: many` entries
